component.name: Xonotic Touch
component.summary: Fast-paced arena FPS optimized for touchscreens

description.p: Xonotic Touch is a touch-first port of Xonotic for Linux phones, tablets, and other touch devices. Game assets are downloaded on first launch so installs stay small.
Touch controls include virtual joysticks, weapon wheels, and configurable layout presets for casual, competitive, and battery-saving play.

screenshot.caption: Xonotic Touch on a touch device

description.p: Pivot to Xonotic Touch: slim packages with runtime asset download, Flatpak and Click builds.
